problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: TenderMind AI — Explainable, Risk-Aware AI for Government Tender Evaluation
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tender documents, evaluate eligibility of bidders, and generate explainable evaluation reports.
key_steps: Extracts and structures eligibility criteria from tender documents
Performs targeted data extraction with calibrated confidence scoring
Generates criterion-level eligibility verdicts with source-linked evidence
Prioritizes reviewer attention using a Bid Risk Score
optimization_claims: Reducing tender evaluation time from days to minutes
